name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Drayton
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a Draton Digistat RF remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The 16-bit ID to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: The switch/channel to send, between 0 and 127 inclusive.

config_entries.label: Command
config_entries.description: The command to send, between 0 and 63 inclusive.
